summary: Specifications page (Item 57812) listing detailed technical specifications for the three welding processes supported by the machine: MIG, TIG, and Stick. Each process table shows power input voltage options, current input at rated output, welding current range, rated duty cycles at various amperages, maximum open-circuit voltage (OCV), and weldable materials. The MIG table also includes welding wire capacity, wire speed, and wire spool capacity.
text:
Specifications

MIG
Power Input: 120VAC / 60Hz | 240VAC / 60Hz
Current Input at Output: 20.8A at 100A | 25.5A at 200A
Welding Current Range: 30–140A | 30–220A
Rated Duty Cycles: 40% @ 100A, 100% @ 75A | 25% @ 200A, 100% @ 115A
Maximum OCV: 86VDC
Weldable Materials: Mild Steel, Stainless Steel, Aluminum (with optional Spool Gun)
Welding Wire Capacity: Solid Core: 0.025"/0.030"/0.035"; Flux Cored: 0.030"/0.035"/0.045"
Wire Speed: 50–500 IPM
Wire Spool Capacity: Up to 12 lb spool

TIG
Power Input: 120VAC / 60Hz | 240VAC / 60Hz
Current Input at Output: 20.6A at 125A | 15.6A at 175A
Welding Current Range: 10A–125A | 10A–175A
Rated Duty Cycles: 40% @ 125A, 100% @ 90A | 30% @ 175A, 100% @ 105A
Maximum OCV: 86VDC
Weldable Materials: Mild Steel, Stainless Steel, Chrome Moly

Stick
Power Input: 120VAC / 60Hz | 240VAC / 60Hz
Current Input at Output: 19.5A at 80A | 23.7A at 175A
Welding Current Range: 10A–80A | 10A–175A
Rated Duty Cycles: 40% @ 80A, 100% @ 60A | 25% @ 175A, 100% @ 100A
Maximum OCV: 86VDC
Weldable Materials: Mild Steel, Stainless Steel

Item 57812
For technical questions, please call 1-800-444-3353.
Page 7

key_facts: MIG on 120VAC/60Hz: 20.8A input at 100A output, welding current range 30–140A, duty cycle 40% @ 100A and 100% @ 75A
MIG on 240VAC/60Hz: 25.5A input at 200A output, welding current range 30–220A, duty cycle 25% @ 200A and 100% @ 115A
MIG maximum OCV is 86VDC on both voltage inputs
MIG can weld Mild Steel and Stainless Steel standard, and Aluminum with an optional Spool Gun
MIG welding wire capacity: Solid Core 0.025"/0.030"/0.035"; Flux Cored 0.030"/0.035"/0.045"
MIG wire speed range is 50–500 IPM
MIG wire spool capacity is up to 12 lb spool
TIG on 120VAC/60Hz: 20.6A input at 125A output, welding current range 10A–125A, duty cycle 40% @ 125A and 100% @ 90A
TIG on 240VAC/60Hz: 15.6A input at 175A output, welding current range 10A–175A, duty cycle 30% @ 175A and 100% @ 105A
TIG maximum OCV is 86VDC; weldable materials are Mild Steel, Stainless Steel, and Chrome Moly
Stick on 120VAC/60Hz: 19.5A input at 80A output, welding current range 10A–80A, duty cycle 40% @ 80A and 100% @ 60A
Stick on 240VAC/60Hz: 23.7A input at 175A output, welding current range 10A–175A, duty cycle 25% @ 175A and 100% @ 100A
Stick maximum OCV is 86VDC; weldable materials are Mild Steel and Stainless Steel
This is Item 57812; technical support phone number is 1-800-444-3353
